title: Isn't She Lovely
album: Songs In The Key Of Life
why_this_song: Isn't She Lovely by Stevie Wonder (1976) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Isn't she lovely?"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Isn't she lovely?"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Through us he's given life to one"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "I never thought through love, we'd be"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "I can't believe what God has done"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "isn't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "isn't" na música inteira?

excerpts.text: Life and love are the same

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Stevie Wonder one question about "Isn't She Lovely", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Stevie Wonder sobre "Isn't She Lovely", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Isn't She Lovely" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Isn't She Lovely" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Isn't She Lovely" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Isn't She Lovely" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
